raw_consumer_statement: I rented a XXXX XXXX  XXXX from XXXX through XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX. I was notified by XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX that they did not have a XXXX XXXX XXXX available and that I would not be charged. I did not discover that I had been charged and not refunded until I was going through my credit card statements while preparing my personal taxes in XX/XX/XXXX. I then contacted XXXX and they stated the merchant ( XXXX ) would not authorize a refund. I contacted XXXX and they returned my email stating " Our records show you prepaid your rental with the tour operator. We regret that we are unable to assist you due to third-party billing involvement. Please contact your booking source for a review of the charges billed ''. I then contacted XXXX again and they gave the same response. I asked that this be escalated to a manager and was told that I would receive a callback, however no one ever called. I tried to initiate a dispute through the credit card, but it was beyond the timeframe to file a dispute.
